rationale: In the citing paper, Wuyts et al. (2004) is cited not only in a broad introductory list but also as the key source for a specific theoretical claim in the H4 development section about mobilizing channel-member resources. That claim is embedded in the conceptual logic for determinants of vendor customization control, which is central to the model. The citation is therefore more than a passing mention, even though the citing study does not directly reuse the cited paper's triadic empirical design.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Wuyts et al. (2004) as conceptual grounding for the idea that vendors can mobilize other channel members when creating customized solutions. This prior insight supports the citing paper's hypothesis development on vendor customer-knowledge mobilization resources and customization control.
